title: Adjust Maximum Time for Query Operations

sections.heading: Step 1: Set the maximum time in milliseconds.
sections.body:
- Select the collection.

- Click **Options**.

- Adjust **MAX TIME MS** to the desired value in
  milliseconds.

sections.heading: Learn More
sections.body:
To learn more about **MAX TIME MS**, see
[cursor.maxTimeMS()](manual/reference/method/cursor.maxTimeMS)
in the MongoDB manual.
